examples: Unlike all of those other so-called heroes who battle the bad guys come hell or high water, Paramecium is a deserter not a fighter.
So, you are a deserter as me?
The Deserter drops out and stops contributing.
"All the men I knew and trained with have been killed, " the deserter told Gray.
The fifth abductee, Hitomi Soga, married an American who is listed as a deserter from the US army.
